rootCause: Quest traversal checks treated any option with a `goto` field as a navigation edge, including `process` options. The Quest chat UI only navigates on explicit `goto` options, so process-only nodes could pass tests while being non-completable in-game.
resolution: Restricted traversal to `type: "goto"` options, enforced quest validation so non-terminal dialogue nodes must include an explicit goto option, and added missing goto choices to affected quests.
